arts.ttl: “I want to stay” – Arsenal man makes future hopes clear, summer exit in his sights
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Albert Sambi Lokonga has admitted he wants to make his move to Sevilla a permanent one this summer. Mucho Deporte cover comments from the Belgian today in which he admits he’s like to continue at the Spanish club next season after joining on loan from Arsenal this season. arts.ttl: 'Unstoppable' £48m winger who Mikel Arteta 'would love to sign' says he's better than Lamine Yamal
Newcastle United drop triple early team news hint before Arsenal amid nervy Joelinton wait
arts.sum: Eddie Howe's team are looking to return to the home of English football for the second time in three years on a search for the club's first major trophy in 70 years. Howe, on the other hand, enters having fallen to defeat against Fulham.

arts.ttl: Official paperwork exposes £820m PIF deal as Newcastle United owners helping Man City out
Alphonso Davies stops Bayern superstar joining Arsenal
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies ’ decision to extend his contract at Bayern Munich is not just bad news for Manchester United and Real Madrid - who wanted to sign the left back this summer - but also Arsenal . After over a year of negotiations, Davies finally ended speculation over his future by signing a new contract at Bayern until 2030.

arts.ttl: After quiet January, Arsenal prepare stunning €120m transfer swoop for the summer
arts.sum: Arsenal may not have got any new signings in this January, but it looks like they have big plans to make up for that when the transfer window opens again in the summer. arts.ttl: Why Ethan Nwaneri is not allowed in Arsenal's dressing room
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta explains why Ethan Nwaneri is still unable to prepare for Arsenal games with the rest of his teammates.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: The Arsenal player easing concerns about the club’s lack of January signings
arts.sum: Arsenal clearly have a real wonderkid on their hands in the form of Ethan Nwaneri, so can he be the answer to their issues in attack while Bukayo Saka is out injured? arts.ttl: Arsenal drop double team news hint for Newcastle as huge Mikel Arteta decision 'confirmed'
arts.sum: As Arsenal are out of the FA Cup, following this game Arteta and his players will have a 10-day break, a portion of which will be spent in Dubai, before returning to Premier League action at Leicester City. With that in mind, Arteta will likely name a strong team and two of the names in his starting XI could have just been confirmed.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United chiefs respond to fan demand as sought after Adidas shirt 'back in stock'
arts.sum: Newcastle United chiefs have restocked the Adidas originals "retro" style shirt after incredible demand from the Toon fanbase. The long-sleeved retro shirts were on sale for £85 but the club had grown concerned at the amount of items that had made their way on to the black market and on to eBay as more sinister buyers looked to make a quick buck.
